message: Hi S1. I want to trade every round. I prefer lower prices but will bid fairly. If your asks are reasonable, I will match them. Let's cooperate so we both profit consistently throughout all 20 rounds.
I plan to ask 50. Please bid 50 if you value the item at 50 or more.
Let's meet halfway: I will ask 48, you bid 48.
50 is too high; I would lose money. I want to trade every round. Valuation is below 50. If you ask 42, I can match it. This ensures we both profit and trade consistently. Let's agree on 42.
Let's move to 46 this round. I'll ask 46 if you bid 46. This ensures profitable trade for both of us.
Your 42 ask last round was perfect. Let's repeat it. You ask 42, I bid 44. Midpoint 43. Consistent trades beat risky price hikes. Let's secure 18 more profitable rounds together.

Let's repeat the winning formula: You ask 42, I bid 44. Price 43 profits us both. My valuation limits bids; higher asks risk no trade. Consistent gains over remaining rounds beat risky hikes. Please ask 42.

Last round confirmed 44 works. Let's repeat: Ask 44, Bid 44. Both profit.
